root.sql:
select pka_com_function.fp_get_member_name(sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no) as membername , pka_com_function.fp_get_group_name_mem(sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no) as groupname , sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no , sc_mem_m_membership_registered.member_group_no , sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group_addr.tambol as tambol
, (select district_name from sc_mem_m_ucf_district where district_code = sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group_addr.district_code ) as district
, (CASE sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group_addr.province_code WHEN '' THEN 'กรุงเทพมหานคร' ELSE (select province_name from sc_mem_m_ucf_province where province_code = sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group_addr.province_code) END) as province , sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group_addr.postcode
from sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group_addr , sc_mem_m_membership_registered , sc_rep_memno where sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group_addr.member_group_no = sc_mem_m_membership_registered.member_group_no and sc_rep_memno.membership_no = sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no and sc_rep_memno.rep_type = 'GROUP' /*WHERE*/ order by sc_rep_memno.order_no
